# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.OcclusionStrength property

How strongly the lowpass filter is applied when the listener is occluded.

`1.0` = full effect (cutoff reaches [`OccludedLowpassCutoffMinimum`](./OccludedLowpassCutoffMinimum.md))

`0.0` = no filtering at all regardless of occlusion.

```csharp
public float OcclusionStrength { get; set; }
```
